extraction.one_line_summary: HIGUITA Sergio attacked with 2km to go on Malbun climb, gained 11 seconds on THOMAS Geraint to take yellow by 2 seconds before final ITT
tactical_patterns: THOMAS Geraint forced FULSANG Jakob to chase HIGUITA's attack, conserving energy before counterattacking in final 500m—yellow jersey proxy tactic.
RODRÍGUEZ Óscar rode stealthily to second place, suggesting pre-race targeting of stage result rather than GC defense.
MARTINEZ Dani led tempo for HIGUITA until final kilometer, indicating BORA precise timing strategy to maximize GC gains before ITT weakness.

rider_signals.HIGUITA Sergio: positive: attacked with 2km remaining on Malbun after team pacing, took 11 seconds on THOMAS despite being weaker time trialist
rider_signals.THOMAS Geraint: positive: tactical intelligence forcing FULSANG to chase, then counterattacked final 500m but conceded minimal time despite ITT strength
rider_signals.FUGLSANG Jakob: neutral: controlled well all week but forced into chase work for THOMAS, dropped to 19 seconds suggests vulnerability on steep finishes
rider_signals.RODRÍGUEZ Óscar: positive: stealthily finished second without visible effort, indicates hidden climbing form or tactical stage hunting separate from GC
rider_signals.PINOT Thibaut: neutral: breakaway stage win after 3-year victory drought, no GC implications but form resurgence confirmed
